final_prompt.prompt:
Create an exploded-view technical diagram of a Sony A7 camera with all components labeled (all in-image text in Spanish).

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view diagram aesthetic — exact line weight and rendering style is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all camera components separated and clearly labeled
Subject: must include Sony A7 camera deconstructed into all its constituent parts with component names
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean technical diagram background — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a technical illustration clarity — exact lighting approach is yours
Color palette: needs a technical diagram direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a technical cutaway surface treatment — exact material rendering is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all component labels in Spanish (e.g., sensor, mirror, shutter, lens mount, battery, LCD screen, viewfinder, buttons, dials, ports, etc.)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Spanish by default; must preserve Sony A7 model accuracy with all components labeled
Avoid:
